mapper.select: SELECT U.USER_ID AS userId, U.NICKNAME AS nickname, U.NAME AS name, U.EMAIL AS email, U.ADDR1 AS addr1, U.ADDR2 AS addr2, U.CREATED_AT AS createdAt, UC.LOGIN_ID AS loginId, UC.PASSWORD_SET_YN AS passwordSetYn FROM USERS U LEFT JOIN USER_CREDENTIAL UC ON U.USER_ID = UC.USER_ID WHERE U.USER_ID = #{userId} AND U.DELETED_YN = 'N'
SELECT USER_ID AS userId, PROVIDER_CD AS provider, PROVIDER_UID AS providerId FROM SOCIAL_ACCOUNT WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}

SELECT UTJ.CATEGORY_ID AS categoryId, C.NAME AS categoryName, UTJ.START_DATE AS startDate, UTJ.END_DATE AS endDate FROM USER_TARGET_JOB UTJ LEFT JOIN CS_CATEGORY C ON C.CATEGORY_ID = UTJ.CATEGORY_ID WHERE UTJ.USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY UTJ.CATEGORY_ID

SELECT UE.COMPANY_NAME AS companyName, UE.CATEGORY_ID AS employmentCategoryId, C.NAME AS employmentCategoryName, UE.START_DATE AS startDate, UE.END_DATE AS endDate FROM USER_EMPLOYMENT UE LEFT JOIN CS_CATEGORY C ON C.CATEGORY_ID = UE.CATEGORY_ID WHERE UE.USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY UE.START_DATE DESC
SELECT IF(COUNT(LOGIN_ID) > 0, 'Y', 'N') AS existsYn FROM USER_CREDENTIAL WHERE LOGIN_ID = #{loginId}

SELECT UC.user_id AS userId, UC.login_id AS loginId, UC.password AS password, UC.password_set_yn AS passwordSetYn FROM USER_CREDENTIAL UC INNER JOIN USERS U ON U.USER_ID = UC.USER_ID WHERE 1 = 1 AND UC.user_id = #{userId} AND U.DELETED_YN = 'N'
SELECT IF(COUNT(NICKNAME) > 0, 'Y', 'N') AS existsYn FROM USERS WHERE NICKNAME = #{nickname}
SELECT IF(COUNT(EMAIL) > 0, 'Y', 'N') AS existsYn FROM USERS WHERE EMAIL = #{email}
